incidents.title: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: Today, I reviewed the results of the Emirati Supplier Programme, managed by the Mohammed Bin Rashid Establishment for Small and Medium Enterprises Development, a subsidiary of the Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism. In 2025, the programme facilitated contracts worth AED1.78 billion for Emirati SMEs, marking a 38% increase from 2024. This programme reflects our ambition to create the world's most empowering environment for entrepreneurs in Dubai. Emiratis will always remain at the heart of our priorities.
